full_text:
Fu Jia (Lanshi)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Jia, styledLanshi, was born in Beidi. Predicted the downfall of many of Cao Shuang’s officers. Acted as an adviser to Sima Shi. Fu Jia was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Fu Jia lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
